description: This Java source file defines a Spring Boot REST controller for managing loan application drafts, including endpoints for creating, listing, retrieving, updating, patching sections, checking readiness, submitting, running risk decisioning, and deleting drafts. It handles authentication via JWT and interacts with related service classes.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraftController
classes.description: Spring Boot REST controller providing CRUD and operational endpoints for loan application drafts, including creation, listing, retrieval, update, patch, readiness check, submission, decisioning, and deletion.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a new loan application draft for the authenticated user.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Lists all drafts belonging to the authenticated user, ordered by most recent update.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves a specific draft by ID if owned by the authenticated user.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Replaces fields of a draft, optionally enforcing optimistic concurrency.

methods.name: patchSection
methods.description: Partially updates a draft's section JSON data.

methods.name: readiness
methods.description: Checks if a draft is ready to submit based on sections and documents.

methods.name: submit
methods.description: Submits a draft if it is ready, locking it from further modifications.

methods.name: decide
methods.description: Runs risk scoring and decisioning for a draft, updating its risk decision status.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Deletes a draft if owned by the user and not submitted.

methods.name: subjectAsUserId
methods.description: Extracts UUID user ID from the Authentication object, throws exception if invalid.
